name: Jonkoping County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the gold quarters of the county arms
the azure quarters of the county arms

description: A square flag quartered gold and blue, charged centrally with the composite arms of Jonkoping County combining elements from the historic provinces of Smaland and Vastergotland.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Jonkoping County, granted in 1945 and combining the historic arms of the provinces of Smaland and Vastergotland that make up the county.

features.symbolism: the field is quartered as a banner of arms, combining the historic provincial arms of the territories that make up Jonkoping County (Smaland and Vastergotland).
the composite arms of Jonkoping County, combining symbols from the historic provinces of Smaland (a crossbow) and Vastergotland (a rampant lion) within the quartered field.
